svg.text: Your complete quick reference for Claude Code -- commands, config, integrations & more
File Locations & Inheritance (loaded top → bottom, merged):
src/CLAUDE.md → Added when working in src/
src/api/CLAUDE.md → Added when working in src/api/
• Hard rules (never modify X, always run Y)
Subfolder files extend parent rules, not replace them.
Use /init to generate a starter CLAUDE.md · /memory to edit
Use fast models for drafts, strong models for review
Combine --output-format json with jq for shell script processing
0 = success · 2 = block & show to Claude · other = error
allow: ["Read", "Glob", "Grep", "Bash(git status)", "Bash(git diff)", "Bash(npm test)", "Bash(npm run lint)"]
Run multiple accounts side by side with isolated configs:
Separate settings, sessions, MCP configs, memory
Note: Unofficial feature. /ide may not work with custom dirs.
